$comment: draft — see ADR-0015. $id host is a placeholder identifier (not a locator) pending the name screen (master doc §13). Shape changes require an ADR.
title: Intent contract
description: The validated input to registerIntent — the ONLY channel through which model-generated content reaches the deterministic core (master doc §6.3, §7.2, §7.3). Identity derives exclusively from stable_ids + effect_type + scope; the contract carries NO model-output-derived fields, and additionalProperties is closed to keep it that way.

stable_ids.description: Stable upstream business identifiers keyed by identifier type (e.g. order_id, invoice_id, approved_task_id, workflow_command_id, authorization_id). At least one is required — the Intent Registrar rejects intents lacking a stable identifier (§6.1).

scope.description: Serialization scope: one in-flight dispatch per (scope, effect_type) (§7.4.3).

authority_ref.description: Reference to the upstream authorization for this effect; freshness/binding is checked deterministically at the commit gate (§7.4.4).
